description: You are a traffic engineer designing a 'Green Wave' signal timing plan. Create a Space-Time Diagram in GeoGebra to optimize traffic flow for a vehicle traveling at 11.2 m/s through 5 intersections spaced 80 meters apart (at y=0, 80, 160, 240, 320). The signal cycle is 60 seconds (30s Green, 30s Red), where intersection k (0 to 4) turns green at t = k * offset. The diagram must include a slider named 'offset' (0 to 30), a visualization of the red light intervals for at least two full cycles (0 to 120s), and the car's trajectory starting at (0,0). Adjust the offset so the car passes through the green waves and save the file as 'green_wave.ggb' in ~/Documents/GeoGebra/projects/.
